name: Puckett Transport Svc
districts_or_customers: Local non-emergency medical transportation customers in Woodstock / north metro Atlanta; no school district contracts identified

fit_notes: Medical (NEMT) transport, not school bus / SPED contractor. Sub-scale and outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in remit.

name: 1 Priority Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: No school district customers identified; Fargo Public Schools contracts with Valley Bus, not 1 Priority. Listed as local transportation provider on City of Fargo FM Ride Source page

fit_notes: Single-employee, sub-$50K revenue local rideshare-style provider; not a school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Jim Stewart Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Pemiscot County / Bootheel Missouri NEMT and secured medical van transport (NPI taxonomy 343800000X); no school district contracts identified

fit_notes: Secured medical/disability van service, not school bus. Founder deceased and listing shows expired status -- likely defunct. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Carrier Transport Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Local Hernando County FL transport customers; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Florida Sunbiz shows entity INACTIVE -- voluntarily dissolved 1/16/2008. Founder Stephen Jones died June 2015. Listing at 7039 Hope Hill Rd, Brooksville reflects historical record
fit_notes: Defunct -- voluntarily dissolved 2008 per Florida Sunbiz; founder deceased 2015. Not an operating school-bus contractor and not a Summit tuck-in candidate.
